channel.title: The Mutapa Times
channel.description: Business and intelligence newspaper delivering curated Zimbabwean news from foreign press for the diaspora.

item.title: Matabeleland Opposition MPs Overwhelmingly Vote for ZANU-PF Constitutional Amendment Bill @ZANUPF_Official
item.description: HARARE – Opposition legislators from Matabeleland featured prominently among the 35 opposition Members of Parliament who voted alongside ZANU-PF to pass the Constitution of Zimbabwe Amendment Bill No. 3 (CAB3), highlighting the region’s significant contribution to the controversial constitutional changes. The Bill secured 216 votes in the National Assembly on Thursday, comfortably surpassing the two-thirds [...] The post Matabeleland Opposition MPs Overwhelmingly Vote for ZANU-PF Constitutional Amendment Bill appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe Mail

item.title: Kenya Moves to Quash Reports of US$2.9 Billion Airport Deal for Chivayo @wicknellchivayo
item.description: NAIROBI, Kenya – The Kenyan government has strongly denied reports linking Zimbabwean businessman Wicknell Chivayo and his company, IMC, to a proposed multi-billion-dollar expansion of the country’s main international airport, insisting that no contract has been awarded and that the controversial entrepreneur has no involvement in the procurement process. The denial follows media reports, particularly [...] The post Kenya Moves to Quash Reports of US$2.9 Billion Airport Deal for Chivayo appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe Mail

item.title: Mutapa Gold Deepens Alliance with Artisanal Miners in New Expansion Drive @263Chat
item.description: State-owned mining firm Mutapa Gold Resources has extended its artisanal and small-scale mining partnership programme to Jena and Kitsiyatota mines, in a move the company says will boost gold production while bringing more miners into the formal economy. The expansion builds on a model first [...] The post Mutapa Gold Deepens Alliance with Artisanal Miners in New Expansion Drive appeared first on 263Chat. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: 263chat

item.title: Zimbabwe legalises crypto sector with new regulations, but adoption questions remain @nehandaradio
item.description: Zimbabwe has introduced its first cryptocurrency regulatory framework, bringing digital assets into the formal financial system while raising questions about how stricter oversight will affect adoption. The post Zimbabwe legalises crypto sector with new regulations, but adoption questions remain appeared first on Nehanda Radio. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Nehanda Radio

item.title: Zimbabwe banks warn credit crunch could undermine economic growth @nehandaradio
item.description: Zimbabwe’s leading financial institutions have warned that prolonged tight monetary and fiscal policies, while stabilising inflation and the ZiG currency, are increasingly restricting lending and slowing private sector growth. The post Zimbabwe banks warn credit crunch could undermine economic growth appeared first on Nehanda Radio. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Nehanda Radio

item.title: ED Protects Another Top Diplomat Caught Smuggling Gold
item.description: By Staff Reporter-Questions are mounting over Zimbabwe’s continued struggle to curb illicit gold trading after businessman and diplomat Enoch Mangirande... Continue reading "ED Protects Another Top Diplomat Caught Smuggling Gold" (via Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwe News

item.title: Disability Umbrella Bodies Push for Greater Inclusion in 2027 National Budget @263Chat
item.description: By Lloyd Mangoh THE National Association of Societies for the Care of the Handicapped (NASCOH) and the Federation of Organisations of Disabled Persons in Zimbabwe (FODPZ) have called on Government to strengthen disability-inclusive budgeting saying the forthcoming 2027 National Budget presents an opportunity to translate [...] The post Disability Umbrella Bodies Push for Greater Inclusion in 2027 National Budget appeared first on 263Chat. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: 263chat

item.title: Watervlei Memorial Burial Park Targets First Burials By Year-end Amid Land Dispute Concerns @263Chat
item.description: The project is expected to provide 40,000 graves during its initial phase, with a further 40,000 planned in a second phase. The post Watervlei Memorial Burial Park Targets First Burials By Year-end Amid Land Dispute Concerns appeared first on 263Chat. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: 263chat

item.title: First Lady leads nation in heartbreaking farewell to 7 Gweru learners
item.description: Blessings Chidakwa in GWERU Seven little coffins, one nation in pain. THIS was the scene at Gweru Sports Club yesterday, where heart-wrenching moments unfolded as the visibly pained and emotionally... (via H-metro) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: H-metro

item.title: Hartzell School Officials Arrested After Two ECD Learners Drown in Disused Swimming Pool
item.description: Hartzell School Tragedy: Officials Arrested After Two ECD Learners Drown Two officials from Hartzell Central Primary School in Penhalonga, Manicaland, have been arrested after two Early Childhood Development (ECD) learners drowned in a swimming pool at the school. The tragic incident occurred on 11 June 2026, with police confirming that the pair now face culpable [...] The post Hartzell School Officials Arrested After Two ECD Learners Drown in Disused Swimming Pool appeared first on iHarare News. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Iharare News

item.title: Man drowns during photo shoot @bulawayo24
item.description: A sightseeing trip to one of Zimbabwe’s most popular tourist attractions ended in tragedy after a 22-year-old man drowned at Bridal Veil Falls in Chimanimani National Park.The victim, Nyasha Mashava o... (via Bulawayo24 News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Bulawayo24 News

item.title: Zimbabwe licenses second gold refinery in Bulawayo @bulawayo24
item.description: Zimbabwe has licensed a second gold refinery that is expected to begin operations in Bulawayo next year, marking a significant development in the country’s rapidly growing gold sector.The new refinery... (via Bulawayo24 News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Bulawayo24 News

item.description: The controversial Constitution of Zimbabwe Amendment Bill (No. 3) has advanced to the committee stage in the National Assembly after opposition legislators failed to call for a formal division of the... (via Bulawayo24 News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews

item.title: Zimbabwe MPs clash over bid to ’kill’ CAB3 @bulawayo24

item.title: How does a whole cabinet agree that domestic workers deserve a measly US$90? @nehandaradio @TendaiMbofana
item.description: Social justice advocate Tendai Ruben Mbofana argues that Zimbabwe’s new US$90 minimum wage for domestic workers is not a victory for labour rights but a state-sanctioned endorsement of poverty. item.title: Quiet Money, Deep Roots: How the Oak Foundation Backs Zimbabwe’s Communities
item.description: The Geneva-based Oak Foundation has funded Zimbabwean causes since 1983. In 2025 its Zimbabwe programme made USD 7.9 million in grants, backing palliative care, landmine clearance, regenerative farming and care for children who have lost parents. #Zimbabwe #Policy #ZimbabwePolicy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Tapiwa Hillary Phillipo
